component.name: ZeroWhats
component.summary: A privacy-first WhatsApp Web desktop client

description.p: ZeroWhats is a minimalist, privacy-first WhatsApp Web desktop client for Linux, macOS and Windows. It wraps WhatsApp Web in a clean native window with a custom titlebar and adds:

ul.li: Native OS notifications (no browser prompts, no MPRIS pollution)
An app lock with optional auto-lock on inactivity
An unread-message counter on the tray icon

description.p: Add update check and auto-update and some security fixes with events schemas.
About screen now shows the version dynamically, bump-version script for single-command releases, spell check dictionary docs in README.
Download toast with "Show in folder" and "Settings" buttons, save-as dialog when auto-download is off, hunspell dictionaries moved to optional dependencies, MPRIS stub refinements.

Spell check with selectable dictionaries, clipboard image/file paste, working stickers and emoji on Linux, a maximize button with double-click-to-maximize, window resize grips, and a tabbed Settings window.
